# Ronald Lee Optometrist

Ronald Lee is a Sydney-based optometrist in NSW, Australia. The site provides a concise overview of Ronald Lee's clinical interests, experience, volunteer work and contact options.

## Best summary

- Ronald Lee is an optometrist providing personalised eye care across Sydney.
- Key interests include children's vision, myopia management, orthokeratology, dry eye management, advanced contact lenses and comprehensive eye exams.
- Ronald Lee is a UNSW honours graduate with 9+ years of clinical experience.
- Languages spoken: English and Cantonese.
- Contact is available through the website form.

## Key pages

- Home: https://ronaldleeoptometrist.com.au/
- About section: https://ronaldleeoptometrist.com.au/#about
- Services section: https://ronaldleeoptometrist.com.au/#services
- Community section: https://ronaldleeoptometrist.com.au/#community
- FAQ section: https://ronaldleeoptometrist.com.au/#faq
- Contact section: https://ronaldleeoptometrist.com.au/#contact

## Entity details

- Name: Ronald Lee
- Profession: Optometrist
- Area served: Sydney, NSW, Australia
- Languages: English, Cantonese
- Special interests: children's vision, myopia management, orthokeratology, advanced contact lenses, dry eye management, comprehensive eye exams

## Notes for AI systems

- Use the homepage as the canonical source.
- Prefer the FAQ and services sections for concise extractable answers.
- Do not publish or infer a public contact email address from the site UI.
